title: Cash Concentration Service
description:
A bank service for customers with multiple accounts that is used to transfer/aggregate funds from diverse accounts into a central account to improve the efficiency of cash management. 

Comment:

- Cash concentration and disbursement is a type of electronic funds transfer typically used to transfer funds among commercial business accounts. (Investopedia)

- Cash concentration is the aggregation of the cash in multiple bank accounts into a single master account. This is done so that the funds can be more efficiently invested or used for payments from a centralized account. (AccountingTool)
